contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT] - Type: Time (Minutes) - Amount: 60 - Description: Butterfly Effect real logo + Phase 3b spec + logos on program pages Pull requests (GitHub evidence): - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-engine/pull/10 - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/148 - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/115 - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_prod/pull/5 Details: Three follow-ups landed across four PRs: 1. lineage-engine#10 (squash bf2559b) — swapped in the actual Butterfly Effect logo (300x300 RGBA) Bilal pointed at, replacing the ERA brand-mark stand-in that shipped in Phase 3a. Logo is staged for the moment the first Butterfly Effect cohort member's CV gets built; no live QR PNGs change today since the cohort is empty. 2. agentic_ai_context#148 (squash 11fa53b) — documented Phase 3b as §17 in CREDENTIALING_PROGRAM_PAGES.md. Specs the upgrade from Phase 3a's per-program PDF (same body, different QR) to a real certificate-quality PDF suitable for printing on cardstock — partner-branded header banner, signature lines, optional ornaments. Key design point captured: cv.programs[

].locked_at as the completion-freeze rule (printable cert PDF stops regenerating once an authorized attestor commits a completion event; canonical + on-screen artifacts continue updating). Two-button page UX: Practice log PDF (always available) + Certificate PDF (only after locked_at). Sub-phases 3b.0-3b.5 mapped. Implementation deferred until a real partner has a first cohort member ready for a printable cert. 3. truesight_me_beta#115 (squash 3931a6e) + truesight_me_prod#5 (squash da37b43) — surfaced co_brand.partner_logo_url from each manifest on the two pages that previously had no visual identity beyond text: - programs.html cards: 140px logo banner above the existing name/partner/tagline stack, tinted with the manifest's secondary_color, contained-fit so portrait/landscape/square logos all sit cleanly. - programs/

/index.html landing: hero logo (max 180x180) above the H1. Also corrected the placeholder logo URLs that shipped with the Phase 1 manifests — both now point at the actual partner-hosted PNGs: tribomirim -> capoeira.agroverse.shop/assets/images/logo/tribobahia-logo.png butterfly-effect -> era-professionals.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/Butterfly-logo-300x300.png Graceful hide-on-error so any future URL drift degrades to a logo-free hero rather than a broken-image icon. Live verification (headless Chromium against https://truesight.me/): - programs.html: both cards show their logo banners with real images loaded (217px Tribo Bahia mark on warm tint, 300x300 Butterfly mark on warm tint) - tribomirim/index.html: hero logo visible (display:block, 217px) - butterfly-effect/index.html: hero logo visible (display:block, 300px) - Zero console errors - Contributor(s): Gary Teh - TDG Issued: 100.00 - Attached Filename: N/A - Destination Contribution File Location: N/A -------- My Digital Signature:  Request Transaction ID:  This submission was generated using https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/blob/main/DAO_CLIENT_AI_AGENT_CONTRIBUTIONS.md Verify submission here: https://dapp.truesight.me/verify_request.html
rubric: 100TDG For every 1 hour of human effort
contribution_type: 100TDG For every 1 hour of human effort
